title: bidens oligantha
intro: Bidens oligantha, also known as Small Burr Marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bidens oligantha are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Bidens oligantha can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
